kirundi.helicase_splits_the_strands_dna_polyme: Helicase itandukanya strand; DNA polymerase yubaka strand yuzuye. Semi-conservative — buri helix nshasha ifite strand ishaje imwe + nshasha imwe. Meselson na Stahl bavyerekanye mu 1958.
kirundi.64_codons_20_amino_acids_the_genetic_c: codon 64 → amino acid 20 (genetic code irenze). AUG itangura; UAA/UAG/UGA zihagarika. tRNA isoma codon, izana amino acid nyayo, yubaka peptide bond.
kirundi.bacterial_immune_system_repurposed_cas: Sisitemu y'ubudahangarwa bwa bagiteri yakoreshejwe ku kindi. Cas9 enzyme + guide RNA = umukasi wa molekile. Doudna + Charpentier batsindiye Nobel 2020. CRISPR therapy ya mbere (sickle cell) FDA yayemeje muri Kigarama 2023.
kirundi.sequence_determines_structure_determin: Sequence igena structure igena umurimo. Hemoglobin itwara O₂, antibody irabimenya, enzyme ikora catalyze. AlphaFold (2020) yahanuye structure miliyoni 200 — ikibazo c'imyaka 50 cakemutse mu mezi 18.
kirundi.forensics_str_profiling_dna_evidence: Siyansi y'ubutabera — STR profiling + ibimenyetso vya DNA
kirundi.codis_uses_20_short_tandem_repeat_str_: CODIS ikoresha short tandem repeat (STR) loci 20. Amahirwe y'uko bihuza ari ay'igitangaza (rimwe kuri quadrillion) igihe loci zose zihuza. Innocence Project — ibihano birenga 245 vy'amakosa vyavanyweho nyuma yo gupima DNA.
kirundi.retrieval_practice_gamified_speed_buil: Kwitoza kubona — mu buryo bw'umukino. Umuvuduko wubaka automaticity — igihe kuraba codon table bihinduka gukorwa vyonyine, working memory yawe iba yisanzuye ku vyiyumviro vyo hejuru, nk'uguhanura ingaruka za mutation.
kirundi.dna_rna_protein_with_retroviruses_hiv_: DNA → RNA → protein — hamwe na retrovirus (HIV) isubira inyuma na reverse transcriptase. Crick yahimvye ijambo "dogma" mu 1957; nyuma avuga risigura iciyumviro, atari ukuri budahangarwa.
kirundi.pick_a_sequence_the_complementary_stra: Toranya sequence — strand yuzuza yuzuzwa na base pairing (A-T, G-C). DNA nyayo yubakwa gutya buri gihe.
kirundi.helicase_unwinds_the_helix_dna_polymer: Helicase yugurura helix; DNA polymerase isoma buri template strand ikubaka uzuzuza. Semi-conservative — buri daughter strand ifite ishaje imwe + nshasha imwe.
kirundi.ribosome_reads_codons_3_bases_at_a_tim: Ribosome isoma codon (base 3 icarimwe). buri codon → amino acid imwe. Genetic code isomwa nka triplet itariho kwisumbuka, itariho akitso.
kirundi.point_mutations_silent_no_protein_chan: Point mutation — silent (protein ntihinduka), missense (amino acid itandukanye), nonsense (guhagarara hakiri kare). Frameshift (insertion/deletion) akenshi irangiza vyose.
kirundi.guide_rna_points_cas9_to_a_20_base_tar: Guide RNA yerekeza Cas9 kuri target ya 20-base. Cas9 ica strand zombi. Repair pathway z'akagingo zugara gene canke zongeraho template watanze.
kirundi.speed_translation_duel_decode_codons_f: Igerageza ry'umuvuduko ryo guhindura. Decode codon vuba urwana n'isaha. Gerageza nimba genetic code iri mu mutwe wawe, atari ku reference card gusa.
kirundi.codon_table_base_pairing_rules_key_ter: Codon table, amategeko ya base pairing, amagambo y'ingenzi (ORF, intron, exon, promoter, repressor) — cheat sheet ushobora gusubira uraba.
kirundi.double_strand_break_created_choose_rep: ✂️ Double-strand break yakozwe! Toranya repair pathway:
kirundi.10_mutation_vignettes_each_shows_a_sho: Mutation vignette 10. Buri imwe yerekana DNA sequence ngufi mbere/nyuma yerekana impinduka. Toranya ubwoko bw'ingaruka — silent, missense, nonsense, frameshift, canke in-frame indel. Nyuma yo gutoranya, coaching isigura impamvu iyi ngaruka ishoboka kurusha izindi.
kirundi.helicase_unwinds_the_double_helix_at_o: Helicase yugurura double helix ku replication origin. Single-strand binding protein zibuza re-annealing. Topoisomerase igabanya supercoil tension imbere ya fork.
kirundi.primase_lays_down_short_10_nt_rna_prim: Primase ishiraho RNA primer ngufi (~10 nt) — DNA polymerase ikeneye 3'-OH kugira ngo extend, bityo ntishobora gutangura strand nshasha yonyine.
kirundi.synthesized_continuously_5_3_in_the_sa: Ikorwa idahagarara 5'→3' mu cerekezo kimwe replication fork igenda. primer imwe kuri buri origin.
kirundi.bacteria_rho_dependent_or_intrinsic_te: Bagiteri — rho-dependent canke intrinsic termination (hairpin loop). Eukaryote — cleavage na polyadenylation signal.
kirundi.100_250_adenine_nucleotides_added_to_3: adenine nucleotide ~100-250 yongewe ku 3' end. Ibandanya mRNA + iyerekana export yayo.
kirundi.each_cycle_aminoacyl_trna_enters_a_sit: Buri cycle — aminoacyl-tRNA yinjira A site → peptide bond ikorwa (23S rRNA ikora catalyze, ribozyme) → ribosome yimuka codon imwe → tRNA ija A→P→E.
kirundi.adds_nucleotide_s_if_not_a_multiple_of: Yongeraho nucleotide. Nimba atari multiple ya 3, reading frame irimuka → codon zose zo hasi zihinduka. Akenshi ikomeye.
kirundi.removes_nucleotide_s_same_frameshift_c: Ikuraho nucleotide. Igisubizo ca frameshift kimwe na insertion.
kirundi.extra_copies_of_a_gene_or_region_can_l: Kopi z'inyongera za gene canke akarere. Bishobora gutera dosage effect (Down syndrome = chromosome 21 y'inyongera).
kirundi.segment_of_chromosome_flipped_may_disr: Igice ca chromosome cahindutse. Gishobora kwangiza gene ku breakpoint.
kirundi.segment_moves_to_a_different_chromosom: Igice cimukira ku chromosome itandukanye. Icamamare — Philadelphia chromosome (CML; BCR-ABL fusion).
kirundi.repeating_unit_e_g_cag_expands_across_: Unité isubiramwo (urugero CAG) yaguka mu bisekuru. Huntington (CAG muri HTT), fragile X (CGG muri FMR1), myotonic dystrophy.
kirundi.xx_female_or_xy_male_y_is_much_smaller: XX (gore) canke XY (gabo). Y iri ntoya cane, itwara gene nkeya (~70) ugereranyije na X (~800).
kirundi.surprisingly_few_many_genes_produce_mu: Nkeya mu buryo butangaje — gene nyinshi zikora protein nyinshi hakoreshejwe alternative splicing. Igice kinini ca genome ni regulatory canke non-coding.
kirundi.if_stretched_out_1_8_m_of_dna_per_cell: Nimba vyambuwe, ~1.8 m ya DNA kuri buri akagingo. Yometse mu nucleus ~10 µm hakoreshejwe histone + supercoiling.
kirundi.amplifies_a_specific_dna_segment_by_2_: Yongera DNA segment yihariye na 2ⁿ (cycle n). Ikoresha Taq polymerase yihanganira ubushuhe. Ishingiro rya molecular biology ya kijambere.
kirundi.massively_parallel_sequences_millions_: Massively parallel — ikora sequence miliyoni za fragment icarimwe. Illumina irayobora. Read length ~100-300 bp, miliyari kuri buri run.
kirundi.programmable_gene_editing_guide_rna_ta: Programmable gene editing. Guide RNA iyobora nuclease Cas9 kuri DNA yihariye. Cut ikora gene knockout canke HDR-mediated insertion. Nobel 2020.
kirundi.thousands_of_dna_probes_on_a_chip_meas: Ibihumbi vya DNA probe ku chip. Ipima gene expression canke detect SNP muri parallel.
kirundi.random_source_of_new_genetic_variation: Isoko ry'impanuka rya genetic variation nshasha. Akenshi neutral canke mbi; gake y'inyungu. substrate ya selection.
kirundi.random_changes_in_allele_frequency_esp: Impinduka z'impanuka muri allele frequency, cane cane muri population nto. Founder effect + bottleneck ni ingero zikabije.
kirundi.movement_of_alleles_between_population: Kwimuka kwa allele hagati ya population hakoreshejwe migration. Bigabanya itandukaniro hagati ya population; vyiyongera diversity mu population.
kirundi.formation_of_new_species_usually_via_r: Ishingwa rya species nshasha, akenshi hakoreshejwe reproductive isolation. Allopatric (gutandukana kw'ubutaka) ni yo isanzwe kurusha.
kirundi.diagram_showing_evolutionary_relations: Igishushanyo cerekana isano ya evolution. Cubakwa kenshi ku igereranya rya DNA sequence aho kuba morphology.
kirundi.allele_frequencies_stay_constant_under: allele frequency iguma imwe munsi y'ivyiyumviro vya no-evolution — population nini, random mating, nta selection/mutation/migration/drift. p² + 2pq + q² = 1.
kirundi.interactive_references_pick_a_topic_be: Ireme rya interactive — toranya ingingo hasi kugira ngo urondere.
kirundi.semi_conservative_each_new_helix_has_o: Semi-conservative — buri helix nshasha ifite parental imwe + newly-synthesized strand imwe. Meselson-Stahl bavyerekanye mu 1958. ~50 bp/segonda muri bagiteri; ~50 bp/segonda kuri fork muri eukaryote (ariko ibihumbi vya fork parallel).
kirundi.mutations_range_from_invisible_silent_: Mutation zitangura ku zitagaragara (silent) kugeza ku zica. Ingaruka zazo ziterwa n'icahindutse, aho, na cell type.
kirundi.a_sampling_of_well_characterized_genet: Ingero z'indwara z'irondakoko zisiguwe neza. Ibikoresho vya genetic counseling na therapy vya none birakura — ku vyemezo vya clinical raba ibitabo vya none.
kirundi.two_unaffected_parents_gen_i_have_one_: Abavyeyi babiri batabangamiwe (gen. I) bafite umwana umwe wabangamiwe + umwe utabangamiwe (gen. II). Umwana wabangamiwe + uwo bashakanye utabangamiwe bafite umwe wabangamiwe + umwe utabangamiwe (gen. III). Imico igaragara kuri ~25% vy'abana ku cross y'abatabangamiwe.
kirundi.trait_skips_generations_unaffected_par: Imico isimbuka ibisekuru (abavyeyi batabangamiwe → umwana wabangamiwe).
kirundi.parents_must_be_heterozygous_carriers_: Abavyeyi bagomba kuba heterozygous carrier aho buri umwe atanga recessive allele imwe.
kirundi.affected_individuals_appear_in_both_se: Abantu babangamiwe bagaragara mu bitsina vyombi ku frequency hafi imwe.
kirundi.affected_grandfather_gen_i_has_unaffec: Sekuru wabangamiwe (gen. I) afite umukobwa utabangamiwe (gen. II) na sekuru wabangamiwe binyuze kuri uwo mukobwa (gen. III). Nta muhungu wabangamiwe uva kuri se utabangamiwe. Imico igaragara cane mu bagabo.
kirundi.family_c_huntington_like_late_onset_tr: Umuryango C — imico itangura kera nka Huntington
kirundi.every_affected_individual_has_at_least: Buri muntu wabangamiwe afite vyibura umuvyeyi umwe wabangamiwe. Imico igaragara mu buri gisekuru. ~50% vy'abana b'abungamiwe barabangamiwe. Bingana mu bagabo + abagore.
kirundi.every_affected_individual_has_at_least_2: Buri muntu wabangamiwe afite vyibura umuvyeyi umwe wabangamiwe.
kirundi.inheritance_pattern_reasoning_ranking_: Inheritance pattern + reasoning ranking — vyombi bigomba kwemezwa mbere ya reveal. Reveal itanga amanota ku ranking yawe intambwe ku ntambwe, atari igisubizo cawe ca nyuma gusa. Igenzura nyaryo rishaka ko umenya impamvu, atari ico gusa.
kirundi.2_rank_these_explanations_most_least_s: 2. Shira izi nsobanuro ku rutonde (nyinshi → nkeya zishigikira):
kirundi.notice_the_ranking_grade_is_independen: Menya — ranking grade yigenga kuri pattern grade — ushobora kumenya ico ari co ariko ugashira impamvu ku rutonde rubi.
kirundi.during_gamete_formation_the_two_allele: Mu gihe co gukora gamete, allele ebyiri za buri gene zitandukana, ku buryo buri gamete itwara allele imwe.
kirundi.alleles_for_different_genes_assort_ind: allele za gene zitandukanye zikora assort mu buryo bwigenga imwe ku yindi mu gihe co gukora gamete (gene ku chromosome zitandukanye).
kirundi.methyl_group_ch_added_to_cytosines_esp: Methyl group (–CH₃) yongewe ku cytosine, cane cane ku CpG island. Akenshi iceceka gene expression.
kirundi.atp_dependent_complexes_slide_or_eject: ATP-dependent complex zikora slide canke zisohora nucleosome kugira ngo zerekane DNA.
kirundi.some_genes_expressed_only_from_materna: Gene zimwe zigaragara gusa kuri maternal canke paternal allele. Methylation mark.
kirundi.23andme_ancestrydna_reveal_ancestry_he: 23andMe, AncestryDNA vyerekana ancestry + health risk. Impungenge — incidental finding, ukuri, gusangira data na third party.
kirundi.in_2018_he_jiankui_edited_embryos_for_: Mu 2018 He Jiankui yahinduye embryo ku HIV resistance → impanga zavutse. Vyaciwe cane. Ibihugu vyinshi bibuza germline editing.
kirundi.hypothetical_selection_or_editing_of_e: Gutoranya canke guhindura kw'ivyiyumviro kwa embryo ku mico itari iy'ubuzima (uburebure, IQ). Ubu bigarukira kuri tekiniki; impaka ku myitwarire.
kirundi.engineered_to_spread_through_wild_popu: Vyubatswe gukwira mu wild population (urugero malaria resistance ku mibu). Ecological idasubirwaho ishobora kubaho.
kirundi.should_we_test_for_untreatable_disease: Twagomvye gupima indwara zidashobora kuvurwa (Huntington)? Bamwe batoranya kutamenya.
kirundi.familial_dna_searches_solved_cold_case: Familial DNA search yakemuye cold case (Golden State Killer, 2018) ariko itera ibibazo ku privacy y'imiryango itavyemeye.
kirundi.reference_genomes_historically_eurocen: Reference genome mu mateka ni Eurocentric. Imbaraga zo kunoza reference diversity zirabandanya (urugero human pangenome project).
kirundi.genome_size_does_not_correlate_with_or: Ubunini bwa genome ntibujana n'ubunyabwenge bw'organism (C-value paradox). Umuntu afite gene count nka roundworm — igice kinini ca DNA "y'inyongera" muri genome nini ni non-coding.
kirundi.building_blocks_of_proteins_9_are_esse: Ibice vy'ubwubatsi vya protein. 9 ni "essential" (ntizishobora synthesize — zigomba kuva mu biryo) — His, Ile, Leu, Lys, Met, Phe, Thr, Trp, Val.
kirundi.essentially_no_beneficial_fixation_exp: Mu buryo bw'ibanze, nta beneficial fixation iteganijwe. Population iri kuri mutation-selection balance canke drift gusa.
kirundi.many_fixations_expected_strong_selecti: fixation nyinshi ziteganijwe — strong selection, population nini, canke vyombi. Urugero antibiotic resistance ya bagiteri.
kirundi.extreme_regime_viruses_cancer_cell_lin: Regime ikabije — virus, cancer cell line, asexual lab population. adaptive sweep nyinshi icarimwe.
kirundi.set_per_base_mutation_rate_population_: Shiraho per-base mutation rate, population size, generation, na selection coefficient. Hanura ni beneficial mutation zingahe zizaba fixed vy'ukuri. Nta score, nta reveal.
kirundi.your_hypothesis_which_slider_has_the_b: Iciyumviro cawe (slider iyihe ifite ingaruka nini kuri fixation rate? Kubera iki?)
kirundi.when_does_the_regime_move_from_drift_d: Ni ryari regime yimuka iva kuri drift-dominated ija kuri selection-dominated? N·s ikubwira iki?
kirundi.why_are_antibiotic_resistance_and_vira: Kubera iki antibiotic resistance na viral evolution ari vuba cane — slider iyihe iri ku mupaka wayo?
kirundi.a_neutral_mutation_s_0_has_fixation_pr: neutral mutation (s = 0) ifite fixation probability 1/(2N). Ivyo bisigura iki kuri large population?
kirundi.could_the_same_population_size_be_drif: Population size imwe ishobora kuba "drift-dominated" kuri weak mutation na "selection-dominated" kuri strong icarimwe?
kirundi.i_can_explain_why_this_n_g_s_combinati: Nshobora gusigura impamvu ihuriro μ × N × g × s rikora iyi regime.
kirundi.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Inquiry widget — nta score, nta reveal, nta answer dump. Ikoresha Kimura full diploid fixation formula (1962) (1−e^(−2s))/(1−e^(−4Ns)), yinterpolate hagati ya Haldane ~2s ku strong-selection limit (Ns≫1) na neutral 1/(2N) ku drift limit (Ns≪1 canke s=0).
kirundi.hypersensitive_contact_inhibition_high: Hypersensitive contact inhibition + high-molecular-weight hyaluronan. Kanseri ni gake cane.
kirundi.axolotl_can_regrow_limbs_spinal_cord_h: Axolotl ishobora kongera gukura amaguru, spinal cord, umutima, ndetse n'ibice vy'ubwonko. Ubushakashatsi ku regenerative medicine.
kirundi.stores_fat_not_water_myth_allows_survi: Ibika ibinure, atari amazi (umugani). Bituma irokoka ivyumweru nta biryo. Amazi aturuka ku kunywa + metabolic byproduct.
kirundi.population_crashed_12_000_years_ago_ge: Population yagabanutse ~imyaka 12,000 ishize. Genetic bottleneck → diversity iri hasi cane. Buri cheetah iri hafi genetically nk'impanga.
kirundi.modern_whales_descended_from_land_mamm: Baleine za none zaturutse ku nyamaswa z'ubutaka zonsa (~imyaka miliyoni 50 ishize). Bene wabo ba hafi bazima — imvubu. Vestigial pelvic bone iracariho.
kirundi.lobe_finned_fish_thought_extinct_since: Ifi ya lobe-finned yatekerezwaga ko yazimye kuva mu gihe ca dinosaur. Ingero zizima zabonetse mu 1938. Umurongo ~imyaka miliyoni 400.
kirundi.diverged_from_brown_bears_150_000_500_: Yatandukanye na brown bear ~imyaka 150,000-500,000 ishize. Bamwe grizzly-polar hybrid ("pizzly" canke "grolar") vyemejwe mu gasozi.
kirundi.dog_breed_genetics_wild_dna_facts: 🐕 Genetics y'ubwoko bw'imbwa + ivyerekeye DNA y'ishamba
kirundi.recent_extinctions_mostly_human_caused: Kuzimira kwa vuba (cane cane umuntu yatewe) + kuzimira kwa kera kuzwi. Isi yagize mass extinction 5 — benshi bavuga ko turi mu ya 6 ubu.
kirundi.6co_6h_o_light_c_h_o_6o_powered_by_chl: 6CO₂ + 6H₂O + urumuri → C₆H₁₂O₆ + 6O₂. Chlorophyll irabikoresha. Isoko ry'igice kinini ca oxygen mu kirere.
kirundi.c3_most_plants_c4_corn_sugarcane_effic: C3 (ibimera vyinshi), C4 (ibigori, ikigazi c'isukari — vyiza ku T yo hejuru), CAM (cactus, succulent — bifungura stomata nijoro kugira ngo bibike amazi).
kirundi.carries_sugars_from_leaves_to_rest_of_: Itwara isukari ivuye ku mababi ija ku bindi bice vy'igiti. Utugingo turazima. Icerekezo kibiri.
kirundi.promotes_stem_elongation_seed_germinat: Yongera uburebure bw'igiti, kumera kw'imbuto, gushira indabo.
kirundi.angiosperm_unique_one_sperm_fertilizes: Angiosperm ni yihariye — sperm imwe ifecunda egg cell (embryo), indi ifecunda polar nuclei (endosperm — ibiryo vy'imbuto).
kirundi.flower_shape_color_scent_match_pollina: Ishusho y'indabo, ibara, umubavu bihuye n'ivyifuzo vya pollinator. Bamwe specialized cane (orchid + ikinyugunyugu cihariye).
kirundi.evolved_in_nutrient_poor_soils_venus_f: Vyakuze mu butaka bufite intungamubiri nkeya. Venus flytrap (snap trap), pitcher plant (pitfall trap), sundew (bifata).
kirundi.symbiosis_with_fungi_fungi_extend_root: Symbiosis na fungi. Fungi zongera aho imizi igera; igiti gitanga isukari. ~85% vy'ibimera.
kirundi.rhizobium_bacteria_in_root_nodules_con: Rhizobium bagiteri mu root nodule, zihindura N₂ → NH₃. Ni yo mpamvu ibishimbo + ibishimbo bifite protein nyinshi + binoza ubutaka.
kirundi.domestication_selected_larger_seeds_wh: Guhinga vyahisemo imbuto nini (umuceri), zidasandara (ingano), imbuto ziryoshe (pome). Vuba aha — hybrid corn, GMO, marker-assisted selection.
kirundi.common_in_plants_rare_in_animals_wheat: Isanzwe mu bimera (gake mu nyamaswa). Ingano ni hexaploid (set 6), strawberry ni octoploid. Akenshi vyongera vigor + yield.
kirundi.stiffening_compound_in_cell_walls_of_w: Composé ibandanya urukuta rw'akagingo rw'ibiti. Ni yo mpamvu ibiti bikomeye + bibora buhoro.
kirundi.make_own_food_plants_algae_some_bacter: Bikora ibiryo vyabo. Ibimera, algae, bagiteri zimwe. Ishingiro rya food chain.
kirundi.break_down_dead_matter_fungi_bacteria_: Bimena ibintu vyapfuye. Fungi, bagiteri, decomposer. Bikora recycle intungamubiri.
kirundi.population_grows_at_constant_rate_dn_d: Population ikura ku gipimo gihoraho. dN/dt = rN. Ntishobora kubandanya iteka.
kirundi.many_offspring_little_parental_care_sh: Uruvyaro rwinshi, ubwitonzi bw'abavyeyi buke, ubuzima bugufi. Udukoko, ivyatsi bibi. Boom-and-bust.
kirundi.few_offspring_lots_of_care_long_lived_: Uruvyaro ruke, ubwitonzi bwinshi, ubuzima burebure. Baleine, umuntu, igiti ca oak.
kirundi.background_rate_1_species_per_million_: Background rate ~species 1 kuri miliyoni y'imyaka. Igipimo ca none ni 100-1000× ca background kubera umuntu.
kirundi.co_photosynthesis_organic_c_respiratio: CO₂ ↔ photosynthesis ↔ organic C ↔ respiration. Fossil fuel isubiza C yashinguwe igihe kirekire mu kirere.
kirundi.each_chosen_for_properties_that_make_b: Buri imwe yatoranyijwe ku mico ituma biology ishobora gucungwa — ubunini, fast life cycle, gukura vyoroshe, genetic tool.
kirundi.heat_separates_double_stranded_dna_int: Ubushuhe butandukanya double-stranded DNA muri single strand. Hydrogen bond zicika.
kirundi.dna_polymerase_taq_from_thermus_aquati: DNA polymerase (Taq — iva kuri Thermus aquaticus) ikora extend primer ikora synthesize DNA nshasha.
kirundi.from_thermophilic_bacterium_in_hot_spr: Iva kuri thermophilic bacterium mu masoko y'amazi ashushe. Irokoka denaturation step ya 95 °C.
kirundi.partitions_sample_into_thousands_of_dr: Igabanya sample mu bihumbi vya droplet. Ibara kubaho/kutabaho — quantification nyayo cane.
kirundi.diagnostics_forensics_gene_cloning_anc: Diagnostics, forensics, gene cloning, ancient DNA (nka Jurassic Park; mu vy'ukuri akenshi <miliyoni y'imyaka 1).
kirundi.first_crispr_therapy_fda_approved_dec_: CRISPR therapy ya mbere FDA-approved (Kigarama 2023). Ihindura patient stem cell ex vivo.
kirundi.faster_than_traditional_knockout_mice_: Vyihuse kurusha knockout mouse ya kera. Bikoreshwa cane mu bushakashatsi.
kirundi.spread_sterility_or_malaria_resistance: Bikwiza ubugumba canke malaria resistance mu wild population. Field trial ikiri mu mpaka.
kirundi.he_jiankui_2018_edited_human_embryos_m: He Jiankui (2018) yahinduye human embryo → uburakari moral + scientific. Ubu vyaciwe mu bihugu vyinshi.
kirundi.fecal_microbiota_transplant_fmt_cures_: Fecal microbiota transplant (FMT) ikiza recurrent C. difficile infection ~90% vy'imanza. Ikoreshwa rindi rikiri experimental.
kirundi.varies_by_body_site_forehead_oily_domi: Bitandukanye ku body site — uruhanga (amavuta, Cutibacterium acnes irayobora), amara (anaerobe), ukwaha (icuya apocrine + bagiteri → umunuko w'umubiri).
kirundi.vaginal_birth_seeds_infant_with_matern: Kuvyara mu gitsina gitera umwana maternal vaginal microbe; C-section skin microbe. Ingaruka z'igihe kirekire zirasuzumwa (zimwe mu mpaka).
kirundi.contains_live_bacteria_prebiotics_hmos: Irimwo live bacteria + prebiotic (HMO) zigaburira gut microbe yihariye (B. infantis).
kirundi.all_major_organs_begin_forming_heart_s: Ingingo zose nini zitangura gukorwa. Umutima utangura gukubita ~icumweru 4-5.
kirundi.apoptosis_pathways_disabled_damaged_ce: Apoptosis pathway zahagaritswe. utugingo twangiritse turazima igihe twagomvye gupfa.
kirundi.tumors_hide_from_or_suppress_immune_su: Tumor yihisha kuri canke isukisha immune surveillance (PD-L1 expression).
kirundi.slower_days_highly_specific_has_memory: Buhoro (iminsi), specific cane, ifite memory. B cell (antibody) + T cell.
kirundi.produce_antibodies_each_b_cell_makes_o: Zikora antibody. Buri B cell ikora specificity imwe. B cell yashizwe activate iba plasma cell.
kirundi.kill_infected_or_cancerous_cells_via_p: Zica utugingo twanduye canke twa cancer binyuze mu perforin + granzyme.
kirundi.y_shaped_proteins_5_classes_igg_most_a: Protein ishusho ya Y. class 5 — IgG (nyinshi kurusha), IgA (mucosa), IgM (itangura), IgE (allergie + parasite), IgD (B-cell surface).
kirundi.junction_between_neurons_electrical_or: junction hagati ya neuron. Electrical canke chemical (akenshi). Gap ~0.02 µm.
kirundi.cerebrum_cortex_thinking_perception_ce: Cerebrum (cortex — kwiyumvira, perception), cerebellum (motor coordination), brainstem (autonomic), limbic system (amarangamutima + memory).
kirundi.brain_reorganizes_itself_strongest_in_: Ubwonko bwikora réorganiser bwongera — bukomeye kurusha mu bwana, ariko bubandanya mu buzima bwose. Ishingiro rya learning.
kirundi.20_of_body_s_energy_at_rest_despite_be: ~20% vy'ingufu z'umubiri mu kuruhuka (nubwo ari ~2% vy'mass). Cane cane kubera Na+/K+ pump ibungabunga ion gradient.
kirundi.engineered_microbes_clean_up_oil_spill: Microbe zakozwe injiniya zisukura oil spill, imyanda ya plastiki, ivyuma biremereye.
kirundi.originally_a_bacterial_immune_system_n: Mu ntanguriro bacterial immune system, ubu programmable gene-editing tool. Doudna + Charpentier basangiye Nobel 2020.
kirundi.microbiome_science_is_advancing_fast_m: Microbiome science iratera imbere vuba. Amagambo menshi azwi (probiotic strain yihariye "ikiza" condition yihariye) ari mbere y'ibimenyetso. Guma ku bisubizo vyashimangiwe cane.
kirundi.germ_layers_what_each_forms: Germ layer — ico buri imwe ikora
kirundi.defined_by_hanahan_weinberg_2000_updat: Vyasobanuwe na Hanahan + Weinberg (2000, vyavuguruwe 2011). Cancer nyinshi zibona ibimenyetso vyinshi. Therapy ikora target ibimenyetso vyihariye vyinshi.
